耐心看几章，后面很精彩！
陆宸穿越了，成了大乾第一纨绔。
爷爷是一字并肩王，爹妈是战死沙场的忠烈，全家就他一个废物。
刚睁眼就摊上大事——在皇宫给人下春药，被顾丞相的闺女一花瓶开了瓢。
系统激活：宿主完成任务可回归原世界。
陆宸：不回！老子欠几百万网贷，回去吃土吗？
系统：……那你中毒了，快死了。
陆宸：那就等死，反正享受一天算一天。
系统急疯了：这届宿主怎么不按套路出牌？！
直到陆宸坐着皇帝御赐的龙辇大摇大摆逛青楼，对着纨绔子弟大打出手！
“京都里除了我，不允许有你这么牛逼的存在！”
一夜之间，朝堂震动，暗流汹涌。
那个只会在床上用力的废物，突然开始用脑子了。
所有人都在等陆宸死，结果等来的是——
三百年不曾现世的大宗师，站在金銮殿上，对着皇帝淡淡一笑：
“陛下，听说你想动我爷爷？”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/52c3e146cc0f0880a0be5839edc779bc~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"吸干了的绘梨衣","author_id":"","book_id":"7612590113779878936","book_name":"陛下若不讲道理，微臣也略懂拳脚","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201810","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4413人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":272,"name":"历史脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=272&name=历史脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7612590201818317336","read_count":"4413","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"162379"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"72","tags":"历史脑洞,历史,系统,穿越,架空,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/52c3e146cc0f0880a0be5839edc779bc~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779307222&x-signature=KBrVjSLbSMfM%2FmcLjZ7Vi1R9ejk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3727789221742371","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"38"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032204002122D1509C5625223956FE"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":""},"stat":{"digg_count":3,"forwarded_count":0,"lis
